resposta:
solution: ```class Solution:
    def maxScoreSightseeingPair(self, values: List[int]) -> int:
        best_i = values[0] + 0
        max_score = float('-inf')
        for j in range(1, len(values)):
            max_score = max(max_score, best_i + values[j] - j)
            best_i = max(best_i, values[j] + j)
        return max_score
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Single pass keeps the best candidate for i (values[i]+i) while computing the score for each j, yielding optimal O(n) time and O(1) space.
